visual_description: A close-up, shaky shot focuses on a hand pointing at an old, weathered map. The map is filled with intricate, handwritten text in a foreign script and is illuminated by a warm, dim light. The hand, with a finger extended, traces across the paper. On-screen text in Chinese appears at the bottom, reading, "他刚刚.. - 你真牛". A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网", is visible in the top right corner. A male voice speaks with a tone of urgent disbelief and confusion, saying, "He just... - You're brilliant." The camera pulls back to a medium shot, revealing a young man and a young woman standing in a dimly lit, stone-walled corridor. The man, with shaggy brown hair, holds the large, old map and looks down at it with a concerned expression. The woman, with dark hair, stands beside him, also looking at the map with a worried look. In the background, a tall, arched window with diamond-patterned panes is visible. New Chinese text appears at the bottom of the screen, reading, "他刚刚消失了". A female voice responds, her tone filled with frantic certainty and a hint of panic, as if she's just witnessed
